title: crotalaria vanmeelii
intro: Crotalaria vanmeelii, also known as Van Meel's rattlebox, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria vanmeelii include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling the roots and leaves in water, and it may also be used as a poultice or topical application to treat skin conditions.
